results.name: corr_periodicity_diff
results.description: The Pearson correlation between the difference in periodicity (periodicity_a - periodicity_b) and the choice of A.

results.name: periodicity_preference_controlled
results.description: The choice rate for option A when it is more periodic than B, but has a similar alternation proportion (|p_alts_a - p_alts_b| <= 0.15).

results.name: over_alternating_vs_under_alternating
results.description: The choice rate for option A when it is highly alternating (p_alts > 0.7) and option B is highly clumpy (p_alts < 0.5).

results.name: alt_motifs_preference_controlled
results.description: The choice rate for option A when it has more alternating motifs than B, despite a similar alternation proportion (|p_alts_a - p_alts_b| <= 0.15).

results.name: corr_max_run_diff
results.description: The Pearson correlation between the difference in max run length (max_run_a - max_run_b) and the choice of A.

results.name: rep_motifs_preference_controlled
results.description: The choice rate for option A when it has more repeating motifs than B, despite a similar alternation proportion (|p_alts_a - p_alts_b| <= 0.15).

results.name: max_run_penalty_controlled
results.description: The choice rate for option A when it has a longer maximum run than B, but similar alternation proportion (|p_alts_a - p_alts_b| <= 0.15).

results.name: length_preference_equal_imbalance
results.description: The choice rate for option A when it is longer than B (n_a > n_b) but they have the same absolute imbalance proportion.
